sentences.text: This call may be recorded. Calling D W on properties. Please note our staff is working remotely due to the current restrictions and we are still here to assist with any needs. If you know the extension of the party you would like to reach you may dial it at any time our office hours are Monday through Friday eight AM to five PM if you have an after hours or emergency maintenance need please press one and you'll be transferred to our emergency answering service who will get a message over to our team and we will reach out to you as soon as possible for a dial by name directory press pound. If you have a maintenance request please press two to be transferred to our maintenance department welcome to the directory please enter the first three or more letters of the parties first or last name using your touchtone key pad. There are two matching entries, please continue spelling the party's name or press the pound is for Randy vices one for Sammy closer to Sammy Moser. Please? Hold while we try to connect you to extension eight zero one. Hi, you've reached Sam E at D W M properties. I am not and to take your call. So please leave a detailed message and I will get back to you as soon as I can. Thank you have a great day. Please leave your message after the tone when done hang up or press the pound key.

Hi, Sammy, my name is Mitch I'm calling with rental sent you a couple of emails saw that you got them and the reason for the call was to set a meeting with you I work with a lot of other property management companies in terms of generating them more qualified leads to the property specifically through our partnership with with Facebook marketplace want to run by to auctions nine T S with you if you could please return my call again Mitch renewal for seven zero eight two eight five three eight three again four seven zero eight two eight five three eight three thanks bye.
